metadata.description: Relex — use Claude end-to-end on your legal matters without ever exposing client PII.

plugins.name: relex-legal
plugins.description: Operate inside a Relex legal case from Claude — set up your practice workflow, start cases, draft, and manage the matter. Clients' names, IDs, and documents stay end-to-end encrypted; Claude signs in over OAuth and works through a PII-safe API.
